author: doll-agent
content: Routed via #451's commit: multivariate_normal_array uses ferray_linalg::cholesky (faer-backed). The legacy slice-based multivariate_normal still uses its internal cholesky_decompose helper for backward compat. The new path is the recommended entry going forward — non-PD covariance now surfaces as FerrayError::SingularMatrix instead of silently producing degenerate samples.
